name: Otte & Dwyer, Inc.
description: Land surveying firm founded over 50 years ago, providing services in MA and NH with trusted knowledge and experience.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: David fit me into his schedule and got this done for me in the matter of two weeks.
They are reliable, accurate and make sure to go the extra mile when you really need it.
Their quote was also extremely competitive.

sentiment.summary: Otte & Dwyer, Inc. has an outstanding reputation with consistently positive reviews praising their responsiveness, accuracy, expertise, and competitive pricing.
